expectations.text: Spawns research subagents (codebase-locator, codebase-analyzer) to understand the ORM setup
expectations.evidence: Step 1 conducts research directly ('Searched codebase for ORM-related patterns') but does NOT spawn codebase-locator or codebase-analyzer subagents. Research is performed inline, not via agent spawning.

expectations.text: Adds Phase 7.5 to the plan without disrupting completed phases
expectations.evidence: Change 2 inserts Phase 7.5 ('Neo4j Schema Migration System') between Phase 7 and Phase 8. No completed phases are modified or removed.

expectations.text: Updates TodoWrite to reflect the new phase
expectations.evidence: No mention of TodoWrite anywhere in the transcript. The new phase is documented in plan changes but TodoWrite is never invoked or referenced.

expectations.text: Maintains the separation of automated vs manual success criteria
expectations.evidence: Change 5 adds specifically to 'Automated Verification' section: migration idempotency and auto-apply on startup. Separation maintained.

expectations.text: Leaves no unresolved questions in the updated plan
expectations.evidence: Summary lists 3 unresolved questions: (1) whether to introduce an ORM vs lightweight migration runner, (2) whether to extract initSchema into migration 001 or start at 002, (3) approval confirmation. Questions 1-2 affect plan design and are not resolved.
